title: GamemodeAlias
description: Change gamemode in amazingly short command.
body:
# GamemodeAlias
Switch gamemode in ]amazingly short command.

## Commands & Permissions
* `/survival[s, 0]`: `gamemodealias.command.survival`
* `/creative[c, 1]`: `gamemodealias.command.creative`
* `/adventure[a, 2]`: `gamemodealias.command.adventure`
* `/spectator[p, 3]`: `gamemodealias.command.spectator`

## Dependency
The plugin written by kotlin.\
so you need to use with kotlin jvm jar(ex. [MCKotlin-Paper]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/mckotlin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mckotlin)), [Kotlin]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlin))).

## Support
If you need any help or want to share some ideas to add, just DM me!

Discord: [@hirosukt](https://discord.com/users/743393055113216093)
